import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
      end
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
      val = 0
    else
      if in_num
        result = list.push(result, sign * val)
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let ts = parse_ints(line2)
let t = match list.get(ts, 0)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  0
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if x > t
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
end
